description: Open .pptx slide decks as read-only slide text, notes, media, and package diagnostics. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description: Rename community submission metadata from pptx-viewer / PPTX Viewer to slide-deck-viewer / Slide Deck Viewer because the live Community directory already has pptx-viewer and powerpoint-viewer. Includes hardened live Community slug/name checks.

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description: Initial read-only .pptx viewer release. Includes slide text extraction, speaker notes, media metadata, package diagnostics, unsupported-content warnings, and release assets for manual installation.
